metadata.text: Feeling decay now, steel in the rib-cage
Realness embraced by ripping the cage down
stay down! You uppity fake clown
Love muscle cuddling the knife, see it shine now
Musket at the skull, comfortable, the pull, trigger pulling just to strike down! (BOOM!)
motivated psychic, Logia to hater touch
Can't embrace a faker, like the paper to my fire brush
Now I see the truth like an Agent Smith smacked me in the face and said, ''You're one of us''
pummel fake smiles with a bludgeon and a blunderbuss
blast radius leaving your corpse as buckets of dust.
and rage in your fine tears.
Isotope to bonds, Lycan knows the bomb
Hydrochloric palms, pyro war I brought, microscopic harm
My demonic arms, supersonic drawl, YO!
EUPHRATES! Know! Hades couldn't catalog victims
I've been sending too many. WOAH!
Labeled since embryo, placenta wrote genetic code
Ones and zeros codec, mastering sound in stereo
Radio Mysterio, hitting targets, Brady throw
Plato knows my philosophy enslaves the data whole
Kratos with the Blades, Pathos getting slayed
Macrocosm shattered like a dinner plate
Incinerate rappers, I'm on a different stage
I could lift Galactus and stare and make him admit mistakes
I'm the fucking phantom of fear, and I accept my place
I'm the Alucard of suffering, yet I refuse to take...
and rage in your fine tears.
[Cinematic Outro, dual vocals, Agatha Blacklight and Vaelrix]
I wonder if she thinks about me
as much as I think about her
my sorrow lives in my dreams
She follows me when I'm  awake
Why? Did I make a mistake?
